_comment: Speaker notes + per-slide titles for OWASP Porto #11 – Déjà vu (18 slides, regrouped). Loaded by js/notes-loader.js. Sections: Welcome(0-1) · OWASP(2-3) · Porto Chapter(4-7) · Next(8-9) · News(10-11) · Today's Event(12-14) · Close(15-17).

slides.title: Cover
slides.notes: Hold on the cover while people settle — OWASP Porto #11 – Déjà vu, May 26th, 18:00, at Euronext (R. de Aníbal Cunha 218). Venue by Euronext, food & drinks by Jumo.

slides.title: Welcome
slides.notes: Welcome everyone to the OWASP Porto Chapter meetup, #11 – Déjà vu.

slides.title: About OWASP
slides.notes: One line on what OWASP is: a nonprofit improving software security through open-source projects, conferences and local chapters.

slides.title: Become a Member
slides.notes: Encourage membership; mention the corporate-supporter ask for companies in the room.

slides.title: Mission
slides.notes: Porto Chapter — why we exist / what we do. Keep it brief.

slides.title: Who Are We
slides.notes: Introduce the chapter leads and volunteers; invite the audience to get involved.

slides.title: Resources
slides.notes: Where to find us: site, email, LinkedIn, Luma (subscribe!), Slack, X. Meetup is retiring.

slides.title: Call for Talks
slides.notes: We are always looking for speakers — scan the QR or use the link.

slides.title: Name Riddle
slides.notes: Recap the previous one: #10 Winter Sunset nodded to OWASP sunsetting Meetup.com (winter = done in winter). This time the cognome is 'Déjà vu' — leave the audience guessing.

slides.title: Next Meetup
slides.notes: Next meetup July 15th 2026, venue still to be confirmed; ask for hosts/sponsors.

slides.title: AppSec Days
slides.notes: Promote AppSec Days Portugal (Porto, Sep 23-24, 2026): 500+ participants, keynotes Lukas Weichselbaum (Google) & Petra Vukmirovic (Numan), CfP closed, early-bird soon, sponsors by tier, volunteers later.

slides.title: OWASP 25th
slides.notes: OWASP turns 25 — celebrate 25 years of open-source security. Tease that there's a surprise at the end, during the social!

slides.title: Today's Event
slides.notes: Divider — hand over to today's programme.

slides.title: Supported By
slides.notes: Thank Euronext for hosting the venue and Jumo for the food & drinks.

slides.title: Agenda
slides.notes: 18:00 welcome · 18:15 Diogo Ribeiro (E-Gov security) · 19:00 Pedro Correia (browser fingerprinting / FINGER) · 20:00 dinner & drinks.

slides.title: Thanks
slides.notes: Thank attendees; we hope they enjoy the event.

slides.title: Feedback
slides.notes: Ask everyone to fill the feedback form — scan the QR (https://forms.gle/7Uxt6fLnGjgRymmC9).

slides.title: Thank You
slides.notes: Close — and remember the surprise during the social!
